opening_line: Patrol in Stairwell B. Landings repeat. I passed the same extinguisher four times. Marker says floor three. GPS says floor three. The stairs keep going up.
notes_for_player: CAM 06 — duplicate landing markers. Seal stairwell before patrol loss.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Stairwell B. South tower. I should be at the roof access by now.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: No hostile. Environment wrong. Walls feel farther each loop.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Twelve minutes on foot. Watch shows twelve minutes. Building shows three.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: You'll see the loop on feed. Tell me what floor I'm actually on.
